3158640.name: Blow Out Demo
3158640.description:
👾Aliens are attacking!! 👾
🔫But all our weapons are useless! 🔫
🌬 So it's up to Mr. Blow (no relation) to BLOW 🌬 them 🌬 away 🌬

Blow Out is a "Non violent" arcade game where you can't kill your enemies, you can only blow them back
It's very fun. Trust me.

This demo contains:
- 13 Levels each with their own concept!
- Like...10 different, "bullet" types that all have different effects
- 17 unique enemies to "Fight"
- Secret Medals
- Some Music
- A lot of code
- Yeah, This DEMO is pretty great. this DEMO is awesome!
- This isn't the full game, it's just a DEMO!!
